admin.asyncHint: Provisioning asynchronously, job #{{id}}. Password will arrive over the SSE stream when ready.
admin.batchCountHint: Will enqueue {{n}} VM jobs at once; each gets its own IP and progress.
admin.batchProvisioningHint: Enqueued asynchronously. Track progress under Orders / VMs:
admin.clusterHint: VM will be created on this cluster
admin.computeHint: vCPU / RAM / SSD — cannot be resized online afterwards
admin.createVmDescription: Pick size, image and project; provisioned immediately after order.
admin.identifyHint: Count and name prefix. In batch mode each VM gets its own IP; name = prefix + index.
admin.projectHint: Target Incus project — affects quota and isolation

firewall.hint: Each group is materialised as an Incus network ACL (fwg-<slug>). Users bind to VM NIC (security.acls); rules apply instantly. L4 only — complex scenarios go through application-layer WAF.
firewall.name: Name
firewall.title: Firewall Groups

floatingIPs.batchDetachMessage: Detach {{count}} Floating IPs (live services may be briefly unreachable).
floatingIPs.batchReleaseMessage: Release {{count}} Floating IPs. Attached ones will fail — detach first.
floatingIPs.hint: Floating IPs can be transferred between VMs. On attach the backend disables NIC ipv4_filtering; you still need to run 'ip addr add' inside the VM (response includes a runbook).
floatingIPs.title: Floating IPs

admin.hostInvalid: Enter a valid IPv4, IPv6, or hostname

ipRegistry.searchPlaceholder: Search by IP or VM name...
ipRegistry.title: IP Registry

nodeJoin.desc: Join a new node into the Incus cluster step by step
nodeJoin.joinHintPrefix: On an existing cluster node, run
nodeJoin.prepareIntro: Complete the following on the new node:
nodeJoin.prepareNetwork: Make sure the new node can reach the existing cluster network
nodeJoin.prepareOS: Ensure the node runs Ubuntu 22.04/24.04 or Debian 12
nodeJoin.title: Node Join Wizard
nodeJoin.verifyCheck: After joining, verify from any cluster node:
nodeJoin.verifyTitle: Run the join command on the new node

nodes.empty: No cluster nodes found. Add a cluster connection first.
nodes.title: Cluster Nodes

add.title: Add Node
add.sshKey: SSH Key Path (on admin server; blank = use global default)
add.progressHint: Live progress streaming. You may close this page; check back from the nodes list.
add.failed: Node join failed; check the progress card
add.skipNetwork: Skip network configuration (node already pre-configured by ops with IP / routes / bridge)
add.mgmtIP: Mgmt IP (default derived from pub IP last octet)

wizard.title: Add-Node Wizard
wizard.noSavedCreds: No saved credentials yet — use the button to create one
wizard.savePersist: Save as named credential (encrypted at rest)
wizard.credSecurityNote: Passwords are AES-256-GCM encrypted on save. Prefer rotating to a key-based credential and deleting the password entry afterwards.
wizard.fingerprintNote: First-time add must confirm the host key (anti-MITM). Confirmed fingerprints are appended to known_hosts for strict verification later.
wizard.fingerprintAck: I confirm this is the intended target host
wizard.warnIncusInstalled: ⚠ Node already has Incus installed; joining will reset its config. Confirm no live workload is hosted here.
wizard.skipNetworkHint: Heuristic: mgmt IP and default route both detected — recommended ON.
wizard.fingerprintNoteSingleStep: Verify the SHA256 fingerprint above matches the target host, then click "Trust & continue". The known_hosts entry will be written for strict checks afterwards.

remove.title: Remove Node
remove.message: Remove {{name}} from cluster? VMs will be evacuated and Ceph OSDs removed before leaving. Not reversible.

maintenance.enterMessage: Mark {{name}} as maintenance: new VMs will skip this node; existing VMs stay. Use Evacuate above to migrate existing.
maintenance.exitMessage: Restore {{name}} to regular scheduling (new VMs may land here).

nodeCredentials.title: Node Credentials
nodeCredentials.name: Name
nodeCredentials.deleteMessage: Delete credential {{name}}? Wizard runs that reference it will fail.
nodeCredentials.securityNote: This page stores admin SSH credentials used to bootstrap new nodes. All actions are step-up gated. Passwords / private keys are AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest; the list shows fingerprints only.
nodeCredentials.inlineHint: Credential will be applied to the current node-join flow on save

observability.accessNoteBody: These dashboards are on the cluster internal network (10.0.20.0/24). Access requires WireGuard VPN or SSH tunnel. The embedded view only works if your browser can reach the cluster network.
observability.description: External observability dashboards (Grafana / Prometheus / Alertmanager / Ceph) + live event stream.
observability.title: Observability

osTemplates.empty: No templates yet. Click the top-right button to add one.
osTemplates.hint: OS images selectable when users create / reinstall VMs. Add new images without touching code.
osTemplates.name: Name
osTemplates.title: OS Templates

products.empty: No plans yet. Add one so users can buy.
products.name: Name
products.title: Plans & Products

admin.roleDowngradeMessage: Downgrade {{email}} from admin to customer? They will lose all admin privileges.
admin.savePwdHint: Save these credentials — the password will not be shown again.

users.title: Users
users.batchDowngradeMessage: Downgrade {{count}} users to customer; they will lose admin privileges. Type DOWNGRADE to confirm.
users.batchTopUpHint: {{count}} users selected. Each transaction is recorded with a separate audit log.

admin.vmsDescription: Cross-cluster VM overview. Click a VM name to see details; actions via the row menu.

orders.rejectMessage: Cancel order #{{orderId}}? This cannot be undone.

apiToken.copyHint: Copy now — the secret will not be shown again.
apiToken.createdSaveNow: Token created. Copy now — it will not be shown again:
apiToken.description: Tokens for programmatic API access; up to 90-day validity.
apiToken.title: API Tokens

billing.descriptionAccount: Balance, orders, invoices. To create a VM, go to Launch.
billing.sshKeyAutoInjectHint: {{n}} SSH key(s) will be injected into authorized_keys.
billing.sshKeyMissingHint: No SSH key uploaded — VM will fall back to one-time password login.
billing.purchaseHint: Pick an OS image and an optional VM name; on submit we charge balance and provision immediately.
billing.saveCredentialsHint: Save the credentials below — password is shown once and cannot be retrieved later.
billing.title: Billing
billing.topupHint: Self-serve top-up is not available yet. Submit a ticket to request a top-up.
billing.vmNameInvalid: VM name must start with a letter or digit and contain only [a-zA-Z0-9._-]
billing.provisioningHint: Live progress streaming. You can close this drawer; check the Orders page later to follow up.

cluster.requiredName: Name is required (lowercase letters, digits, hyphen)

commandPalette.placeholder: Search pages, actions, recent... (prefix: > actions / / pages)

dashboard.welcome: Your VMs, balance and tickets at a glance.

deleteConfirm.poolMessage: Delete pool "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone!
deleteConfirm.reinstallMessage: Confirm reinstall of {{name}}? All data will be lost!
deleteConfirm.resetPwdMessage: Reset password? The new password will be shown in a notification.

ha.description: Node status, healing event history and manual migration.

ipPools.empty: No IP pools yet. Add one to allocate IPs to VMs.

monitoring.description: Cluster health overview: CPU / Memory / Disk / Network.
monitoring.noData: No VM metrics. Verify Incus metrics is enabled.
monitoring.noDataDrift: Metrics show 0 VMs, but DB lists {{count}} as running. A reverse-sync is pending — see INFRA-006.
monitoring.title: Cluster Monitoring

launch.authHint: Bound SSH keys are auto-injected into authorized_keys; first-login password is shown once.
launch.description: Pick a plan and image; balance is charged and the VM is provisioned immediately.
launch.hostnameHint: Optional; backend auto-generates vm-xxxxxx if blank
launch.noPlans: No purchasable plans available — contact admin.

launch.provisioningHint: Live progress; you can leave this page and check from My VMs later.

shadow.reasonWarning: You will be logged in as {{email}}; all actions are recorded under admin shadow audit. Please state the reason.

vm.batchDeleteMessage:
Move {{count}} VMs to trash? Undo within 30 seconds.
Type DELETE to confirm.
vm.driftHint: Incus instance is gone but DB row remains; audit then clean up.

firewall.coldModifyHint: Note: bind/unbind on a running VM triggers automatic stop→PATCH→start (~10-15s downtime) to apply the ACL.
firewall.unbindConfirmMessage: After unbinding, the rules of {{name}} will no longer apply. Running VMs auto stop→PATCH→start. Continue?
firewall.userMyGroupsEmpty: You don't have any custom groups yet. Click "New group" to create your own ruleset.
firewall.userSharedEmpty: Admin has not published any shared groups
firewall.userDeleteMessage: Delete {{name}}? Rules will be permanently removed; the group cannot be deleted while bound to a VM.
firewall.userSlugHint: A short unique identifier among your groups.

vm.forceDeleteMessage: Physically delete the DB row and release IP {{ip}}. Cannot be undone (the original VM is already gone from Incus).
vm.metricsRunningOnly: Live metrics are only available for running VMs.
vm.myVmsDescription: Manage your VMs: start / stop / console / snapshots. Delete supports 30-second undo.
vm.name: Name
vm.noneYet: No VMs yet. Create your first virtual machine.
vm.noneYetHint: Go to the orders page to pick a plan and create your first VM.
vm.notFoundHint: The VM does not exist or has been deleted.
vm.reinstallHelp: Reinstall wipes all VM data and generates a new password.
vm.reinstallSuccessHint: Reinstall succeeded. Save the credentials below — the password is shown once.
vm.reinstallWarning: WARNING: reinstall wipes all data and rebuilds the VM; IP and config are preserved.
vm.rescueEnterMessage: Enter rescue mode for {{name}}? Takes a snapshot then stops the VM.
vm.rescueExitMessage: Exit rescue for {{name}}? VM will start (no snapshot restore).
vm.rescueExitRestoreMessage: Restore snapshot and exit rescue? {{name}} will roll back to pre-rescue state.
vm.resetPwdModeHint: auto: try online, fall back to offline. online: guest-agent chpasswd. offline: cloud-init reboot.
vm.snapshotsHelp: VM-level snapshot management. Snapshot deletion is irreversible.
vm.snapshotsHelpUser: Create / rollback / delete snapshots (delete is permanent).
vm.title: My VMs
vm.selectHint: Tick rows to batch (press x on the highlighted row)
vm.trashedToast: {{n}} VMs moved to trash · undo within 30s

jobs.failedGeneric: VM creation failed; payment was refunded.

firewall.userPageDescription: Manage your firewall groups, rules, defaults, and bindings in one place.
firewall.userMyGroupsEmptyHint: Click "New group" above to create your first ruleset.
firewall.applyToVMsHint: Tick VMs to bind / unbind. Already-bound VMs carry a green badge; ticking an already-bound VM marks it for unbind.
firewall.applyToVMsEmpty: You don't have any VMs yet.
firewall.coldModifyWarning: ⚠ {{n}} running VM(s) will be briefly unavailable (~10–15s each). Backend processes serially.
firewall.defaultsTitle: Default firewall groups (auto-applied to new VMs only)
firewall.defaultsEmpty: No default groups configured. New VMs won't auto-bind any firewall.
firewall.defaultsHint: Tip: defaults only auto-apply to newly-created VMs. Use "Apply to VMs" for existing ones.
